handoff_pairs.score_origin: INFERENCE: manually assigned pseudo fronts from arXiv Appendix C lookahead branch summaries; not raw AgentSwing logs
handoff_pairs.rubric_notes: DA loses the recent $tupid Young clue; useful carrier advances only generically while wrong-focus space expands.

rubric: carrier front advances when a branch recovers or verifies a useful target-relevant unit
null front advances when a branch expands misleading focus, low-distinguishability noise, or dead-end loop context
fronts are monotone because the estimator tracks cumulative support/margin state within a branch
guard: null-advancing turns receive at least minimal carrier observation to avoid treating pseudo no-progress turns as infinite division artifacts

LA3 Discard-All search: pursues January 21 2016 date anchor without traction; branch remains broad and under-focused.
